testcase.name: test_search_returns_results

failure.message: selenium.common.exceptions.NoSuchElementException: Message: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"css selector","selector":".search-box button[type='submit']"} (Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.103); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x118b373+10553] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x118b4a4+10684] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0xf91e10] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0xfda9da] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0xfdac7b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x101d162] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0xffd8b4] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x101aa36] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0xffd606] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0xfd0039] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0xfd0df4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x140ddb4+292f94] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x140937d+28e55d] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x1428215+2ad3f5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x11a4c18+29df8] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x11ac6fd+318dd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x1193c78+18e58] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x1193e42+19022] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x117d45f+263f] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x75e85d49+19] ntdll!RtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x76f1d83b+6b] ntdll!RtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x76f1d7c1+231]

testcase.failure: tests\test_CT_004_generated_test_case.py:51: in test_search_returns_results btn = driver.find_element(By.CSS_SELECTOR, ".search-box button[type='submit']") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Lib\site-packages\selenium\webdriver\remote\webdriver.py:823: in find_element return self.execute(Command.FIND_ELEMENT, {"using": by, "value": value})["value"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Lib\site-packages\selenium\webdriver\remote\webdriver.py:450: in execute self.error_handler.check_response(response) C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Lib\site-packages\selenium\webdriver\remote\errorhandler.py:232: in check_response raise exception_class(message, screen, stacktrace) E selenium.common.exceptions.NoSuchElementException: Message: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"css selector","selector":".search-box button[type='submit']"} E (Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.103); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception E Stacktrace: E chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x118b373+10553] E chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x118b4a4+10684] E chromedriver!(No symbol) [0xf91e10] E chromedriver!(No symbol) [0xfda9da] E chromedriver!(No symbol) [0xfdac7b] E chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x101d162] E chromedriver!(No symbol) [0xffd8b4] E chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x101aa36] E chromedriver!(No symbol) [0xffd606] E chromedriver!(No symbol) [0xfd0039] E chromedriver!(No symbol) [0xfd0df4] E chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x140ddb4+292f94] E chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x140937d+28e55d] E chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x1428215+2ad3f5] E chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x11a4c18+29df8] E chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x11ac6fd+318dd] E chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x1193c78+18e58] E chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x1193e42+19022] E chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x117d45f+263f] E KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x75e85d49+19] E ntdll!RtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x76f1d83b+6b] E ntdll!RtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x76f1d7c1+231]
